halts: DERIVABLE+AMBIGUOUS = 10; expected ~136 per monitoring report. The monitoring report's "136 items lacking Tier 1 priority ISO" overstates the backfill opportunity because most of those rows are INHERENTLY_SUPRANATIONAL (IMO/ICAO/EU/GLOBAL multi-jurisdiction standards) — they're correctly tagged at supranational scope, not mistagged. The derivable subset is small and clean. PR will surface this divergence.
